final:
module register_8bit(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [8-1:1-1] d,
    output reg [7:0] q);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 8'b00000000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
